description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a light-colored brick exterior and a prominent front porch supported by multiple columns. The front facade is characterized by large, evenly spaced windows on both levels, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The roof is a low-pitched, extended shed style that covers the porch and provides a sheltered entryway. The landscaping includes neatly trimmed hedges and a stone walkway leading up to the main entrance. The interior layout is visible from above, revealing multiple rooms with varied wallpaper and furnishings, suggesting a spacious and well-organized residential design. The overall aesthetic is clean and modern, with subtle traditional elements in the porch and window arrangement.
description: A two-story rectangular house with a light brick exterior, large windows, and a wide front porch with columns and hedges.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a flat brick wall with large windows on both floors and a glimpse into the interior rooms.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the extended shed roof, side windows, and the edge of the porch, with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entryway, wide porch with columns, symmetrical window arrangement, and a central stone walkway.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals more of the side rooms, additional windows, and the continuation of the porch roof and hedges.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with wide steps, covered porch supported by columns, and a prominent overhanging roof.
